title: montia linearis
intro: Montia linearis, also known as the waterwort or slender montia, is a perennial aquatic plant native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Montia linearis can be prepared for herbal use by making teas, infusions, or decoctions from its leaves, stems, or roots.
